scripts.name: Agent Activity Tracker
scripts.description: Tracks agent actions across rooms with hourly summaries
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Agent Handoff
scripts.description: Logs context when agents move between rooms for seamless continuity
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Agent Mood System
scripts.description: Assigns mood based on tool success rate — productive, stuck, or idle
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Auto-Assign Agent
scripts.description: Automatically assigns the best-suited agent to a room based on task type and historical affinity
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Auto Phase Advance
scripts.description: Detects when exit criteria are met and automatically requests phase advancement
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Changelog Generator
scripts.description: Creates changelog entries from exit document summaries and phase transitions
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Code Complexity Alert
scripts.description: Emits warnings when high-complexity files are modified and tracks change frequency
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Custom Dashboard Widget
scripts.description: Aggregates room and agent stats for a live dashboard widget
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Daily Standup Reporter
scripts.description: Generates daily standup reports from room and agent activity
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Deadline Tracker
scripts.description: Tracks and alerts on approaching deadlines across rooms
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Dependency Watcher
scripts.description: Tracks dependency update reminders and monitors for outdated packages
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Email Digest
scripts.description: Creates periodic digests from agent activity for email distribution
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Escalation Notifier
scripts.description: Sends notifications when issues are escalated or stale
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Exit Document Validator
scripts.description: Advanced exit document validation beyond built-in schema checks
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Export to Markdown
scripts.description: Formats exit documents and project state as markdown for external sharing
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: GitHub Sync
scripts.description: Syncs phase decisions and project state to GitHub issues format
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Keyboard Shortcuts
scripts.description: Emits keyboard shortcut hint events for common Overlord actions
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Phase Gate Reporter
scripts.description: Generates detailed gate summary reports on every phase transition
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Progress Dashboard
scripts.description: Calculates project completion percentage across all phases
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: RAID Summary
scripts.description: Generates periodic RAID log summaries with trend analysis
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Room Timer
scripts.description: Time-boxes room sessions with configurable durations and expiry events
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Scope Creep Detector
scripts.description: Counts tasks created per phase and warns when scope grows beyond threshold
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Theme Switcher
scripts.description: Dynamic theme switching with custom color schemes
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Time Estimator
scripts.description: Tracks time per room and estimates remaining project duration
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: TODO Scanner
scripts.description: Tracks TODO and FIXME counts across rooms and tool executions
scripts.author: Overlord Team

scripts.name: Webhook Forwarder
scripts.description: Forwards Overlord events to configured webhook URLs
scripts.author: Overlord Team
